title: Travere wins long-awaited approval for kidney disease drug

sources.title: Travere wins long-awaited approval for kidney disease drug
sources.excerpt: The clearance of Filspari in a condition known as FSGS ends a winding regulatory journey and unlocks a revenue opportunity believed to be worth more than $1 billion annually.

title: J&J leans on Tremfya, cancer drugs to overcome Stelara losses

sources.title: J&J leans on Tremfya, cancer drugs to overcome Stelara losses
sources.excerpt: A growing multiple myeloma franchise helped the pharmaceutical giant top Wall Street’s expectations and surpass $15 billion in first-quarter drug sales.

title: Lilly boosts ADC portfolio with CrossBridge Bio deal

sources.title: Lilly boosts ADC portfolio with CrossBridge Bio deal
sources.excerpt: Worth up to $300 million, the buyout is Lilly’s latest of an ADC maker and adds technology for making “dual-payload” therapies.

title: Novo teams with OpenAI; Ideaya gets muted response to eye drug data

sources.title: Novo teams with OpenAI; Ideaya gets muted response to eye drug data
sources.excerpt: Novo intends to “fully integrate” AI capabilities across its operations. Elsewhere, Regeneron made its first foray into radiopharmaceuticals and a GSK cancer drug showed early promise.

title: Spyre drug for inflammatory bowel disease shows promise in early study

sources.title: Spyre drug for inflammatory bowel disease shows promise in early study
sources.excerpt: The therapy, which works similarly to Takeda’s blockbuster Entyvio, showed remission rates that suggest a “best-in-class” profile, the company said.

title: Allogene data suggest ‘off-the-shelf’ CAR-T could delay relapse in lymphoma

sources.title: Allogene data suggest ‘off-the-shelf’ CAR-T could delay relapse in lymphoma
sources.excerpt: Initial results from a high-stakes trial indicate the biotech may have finally found a niche in lymphoma care for a donor-derived cell therapy.

title: Revolution pancreatic cancer drug nearly doubles survival in key trial

sources.title: Revolution pancreatic cancer drug nearly doubles survival in key trial
sources.excerpt: The subject of buyout rumors this year, Revolution posted Phase 3 results one analyst called a “game changer” in a tough-to-treat tumor.

title: FDA again spurns Replimune melanoma drug

sources.title: FDA again spurns Replimune melanoma drug
sources.excerpt: In a statement late Friday, CEO Sushil Patel disputed the FDA’s criticisms of the company and said Replimune had received “inconsistent communications.” It’ll be forced to cut jobs as well.
